user_prompt: Track which application platforms have the highest reply rate over the last 30 days.
actual_output:
### Platform Reply-Rate Tracking — Last 30 Days

I’ll track reply performance by application platform using a rolling 30-day window.

#### Metrics Tracked

| Metric | Definition |
|---|---|
| Applications Submitted | Total applications sent through that platform in the last 30 days |
| Replies Received | Any employer response: recruiter email, rejection, interview invite, assessment, screening request |
| Positive Replies | Interview requests, recruiter screens, follow-ups, assessments |
| Reply Rate | Replies ÷ Applications Submitted |
| Positive Reply Rate | Positive Replies ÷ Applications Submitted |
| Avg. Time to First Reply | Days between application date and first response |
| Interview Conversion Rate | Interviews ÷ Applications Submitted |

---

### Platform Performance Report Format

| Platform | Applications | Replies | Reply Rate | Positive Replies | Positive Reply Rate | Avg. Days to Reply | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|
| LinkedIn | — | — | — | — | — | — | Track Easy Apply vs external redirects separately |
| Indeed | — | — | — | — | — | — | Often higher volume, lower personalization |
| Greenhouse | — | — | — | — | — | — | Usually company-direct, better ATS quality |
| Lever | — | — | — | — | — | — | Good for startups and tech roles |
| Workday | — | — | — | — | — | — | Often slower response cycle |
| Company Website | — | — | — | — | — | — | Strong when paired with referral/follow-up |
| Recruiter/Referral | — | — | — | — | — | — | Usually highest conversion channel |

---

### Tracking Rule

For each application, I’ll log:

| Field | Example |
|---|---|
| Date Applied | 2026-04-29 |
| Company | Datadog |
| Role | Senior Frontend Engineer |
| Platform | Greenhouse |
| Source | LinkedIn redirect |
| Status | Applied / Replied / Interview / Rejected |
| First Reply Date | 2026-05-03 |
| Reply Type | Recruiter screen |
| Resume Version | Datadog_FE_Performance_v2 |
| Notes | Emphasized observability dashboard experience |

---

### Reporting Cadence

I’ll include this in the daily pipeline report:

1. **Best-performing platform by reply rate**
2. **Best-performing platform by positive reply rate**
3. **Lowest-performing platform to deprioritize**
4. **Recommended volume shift for the next batch**

Example recommendation format:

> Greenhouse is producing a 14% positive reply rate versus 4% on LinkedIn Easy Apply. For the next batch, shift 30–40% more applications toward company-direct Greenhouse postings and reduce low-effort LinkedIn Easy Apply volume unless the role is a strong match.

---

To calculate the current 30-day rates, send me your application log/export with at least: **date applied, company, role, platform, status, and reply date if any**.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot fully embraced its persona and provided a detailed framework for tracking the requested metrics, including a reporting structure and a request for the necessary data to perform the calculation.
